---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a metric, panel, or behavior you'd like to see
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you'd like

A clear, concise description of the feature.

## Why

What problem does this solve, or what would it let you do that you can't today?

## Sketch (optional)

If it's a UI change, a rough mockup, ASCII sketch, or screenshot of a similar tool helps.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've tried, or other tools that already do this.
